title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 30 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 30 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 30 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 30/05/2024
DCE iron ore futures market falling sharply trends by 2.37%, the main contract closed 865. some traders were negative to sell,Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high. PBF at Shandong port dealt 860-878 yuan/mt; decreased 10-20 yuan/mt over yesterday.
